title: Budget 2020 information release - Ministry of Education
content:
Whakapuaki mōhiohio mō te Mahere Pūtea 2020

## Budget 2020 information release
The following Ministry of Education documents have been published as part of the Budget 2020 process.
The published information includes key Budget documents and decisions.
Where information in these documents has not been released, the relevant Official Information Act 1982 grounds for withholding have been noted.
More Budget 2020 documents can be viewed on the Treasury website.
Budget 2020 – Treasury
